prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第115名，近年排名稳定在113–115区间，属全国中上游水平；该校在声誉文件中无负面舆情记录，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第59位，评价为"较热"，短视频平台有一定关注度；历史投档异常记录中未见该校，无断档历史；学科评估；该校以林学、林业工程为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校招生专业结构匹配；河南省2026年高考总人数约120万（数据标注不确定），按近年物理类/历史类占比估算，物理类考生约73.4万人，较2025年55.5万人增加约32%，考生规模大幅增长加剧整体竞争。；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区，对河南考生而言存在一定地域距离偏好影响；该校在河南招生人数占比较大（2025年物理类+历史类共322人），是该校在省外的重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次68439名、2026年计划大幅扩招61人（+21.6%）、河南省物理类考生预计增加约32%等因素，扩招带来的位次上移效应被考生规模大幅增长部分抵消，竞争总体加剧。预测2026年理科最低位次约77822名，区间77322–78322名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum science ranking was approximately 33462 → 116434 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 47216 → 38682 → 68439, with the 2025 baseline at about 68439. Excluding the 2022 gap anomaly, the ranking trend over the past three years has shifted backward, with a shift of about 29757 from 2024 to 2025, showing significant fluctuation; the university's science enrollment plan in Henan Province was 270 in 2021 → 272 in 2022 → 273 in 2023 → 268 in 2024 → 282 in 2025 → 343 in 2026, with an increase of 61 students (+21.6%) from 2025 to 2026, a significant expansion that theoretically intensifies competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 115th in 2026, with a stable ranking in the 113–115 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; there are no negative public opinion records in the university's reputation file, indicating a stable reputation; its Douyin popularity total ranking is 59th, rated as 'relatively hot', with some attention on short video platforms; no historical abnormal filing records for this university, no gap history; discipline evaluation: the university has traditional strengths in forestry and forestry engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, matching the university's enrollment major structure; the total number of Henan Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 1.2 million (data annotation uncertain), and based on recent estimates of the physics/history category ratio, physics category candidates are about 734,000, an increase of about 32% from 555,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying overall competition due to the large increase in candidate numbers; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, which may have some regional distance preference impact on Henan candidates; the university enrolls a relatively large number of students in Henan (a total of 322 in physics and history categories in 2025), making it an important source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 68439, the significant enrollment expansion of 61 students (+21.6%) in 2026, and the estimated increase of about 32% in Henan physics category candidates, the upward effect on ranking from expansion is partially offset by the large increase in candidate numbers, leading to intensified overall competition. It is predicted that the minimum science ranking in 2026 will be about 77822, with a range of 77322–78322.
